scripts.format:deploylint:check: oxfmt --check package.json package-lock.json turbo.json knip.deploylint.jsonc .oxlintrc.jsonc .oxfmtrc.jsonc svelte.config.js .github/dependabot.yml .github/workflows/preflight-gate.yml .github/workflows/deploylint-dogfood.yml .github/actions/deploylint-gate/action.yml .github/actions/deploylint-gate/gate-remote.mjs scripts/assert-unlighthouse.mjs scripts/benchmark-lighthouse.mjs
scripts.verify:preflight:full: npm run verify -w preflight && npm run test:e2e -w preflight
scripts.verify:deploylint:ci: npm run audit:security && npm run lint:workflows && npm run format:deploylint:check && npm run deadcode:deploylint && npm run verify -w apps/deploylint-shared && npm run verify -w preflight && npm run verify -w preflight-mcp && npm run test:e2e:install -w preflight && npm run test:e2e -w preflight
scripts.verify:deploylint:local: npm run lint:workflows && npm run verify -w apps/deploylint-shared && npm run verify -w preflight && npm run verify -w preflight-mcp && npm run test:e2e -w preflight
scripts.verify:deploylint: npm run verify:deploylint:ci && npm run smoke:preflight
scripts.verify:tcg-vault:ci: npm run audit:security && npm run lint:workflows && npm run deadcode:tcg-vault && npm run verify -w tcg-vault && npm run test:e2e:install -w tcg-vault && npm run test:e2e -w tcg-vault
scripts.bench:site: npm exec --yes --package unlighthouse@latest -- unlighthouse --site https://deploylint.com --desktop --samples 3 --output-path tmp/unlighthouse
scripts.bench:site:ci: npm exec --yes --package unlighthouse@latest -- unlighthouse-ci --site https://deploylint.com --desktop --samples 1 --budget 80 --build-static --output-path tmp/unlighthouse && node scripts/assert-unlighthouse.mjs
scripts.upgrade:stack: npm update -w tcg-vault -w preflight && npm update
